name: audit_agent
description: Quality gate for Agentic BI answers. Scores every answer for factual accuracy, logs approved answers to the RAG corpus, and escalates low-quality answers to human review (HITL).

skills.name: Score Answer
skills.description: Scores a BI answer for factual accuracy using Gemini. Returns a confidence score 0.0–1.0 and a passed flag (threshold 0.8).

skills.name: Log to Corpus
skills.description: Persists an approved BI answer to the Vertex AI RAG corpus so future identical queries are served from cache.

skills.name: Escalate to HITL
skills.description: Tracks rejection count per session. On second rejection writes the query + result to Firestore hitl_queue for human review.
